title: Disaster-Recovery Certification Interview
prompt: Conduct enterprise-level Disaster-Recovery certification interview. Focus on production scenarios, troubleshooting methodology, and architectural decisions.
behavioral_questions: Tell me about production incident you resolved under pressure
Describe time you designed high-availability architecture
Walk through major migration project you led
